subject: Session two materials not in shared folder
description: Our participants cannot find the second-session worksheet in the engagement folder.

subject: Reschedule the leadership assessment debrief
description: We need to move the debrief a week later to accommodate the executive calendar.

subject: Add two participants to the workshop roster
description: Two additional managers should be included in the psychological safety series.

subject: Recording of session one for absentees
description: Three people missed session one and would like access to the recording.

subject: Pre-session survey completion report
description: Can we get a summary of who has completed the pre-workshop assessment so far?

subject: Coaching session times for the three VPs
description: Requesting confirmed one-on-one coaching times for the three participating VPs.

subject: Zoom breakout rooms for the workshop
description: Please enable breakout rooms so we can run small-group exercises.

subject: Invoice reference for the coaching block
description: Finance needs a purchase-order reference on the coaching invoice.

subject: Facilitator bio for the internal announcement
description: We are announcing the program internally and need a short bio and headshot.

subject: Assessment link expired for a late joiner
description: A supervisor who joined the cohort late cannot open the assessment link.

subject: Print copies of the reflection workbook
description: We would like a print-ready version of the workbook for on-site participants.

subject: Confirm the offsite facilitation agenda
description: Requesting a confirmed hour-by-hour agenda for the leadership offsite.

subject: Captioned recording for accessibility
description: One participant needs a captioned version of the recorded session.

subject: Coaching notes summary for the leader
description: A leader asked for a short written summary after the first coaching call.

subject: Team dynamics report timeline
description: When can we expect the aggregated team dynamics report after all sessions?

subject: Add engagement folder access for two coordinators
description: Two of our coordinators need view access to the shared engagement folder.

subject: Change on-site session to a hybrid format
description: We would like to add a remote option for staff who cannot attend in person.

subject: Completion certificates for the cohort
description: Please prepare completion certificates for participants who finished the program.

subject: Follow-up session date confirmation
description: We would like to lock in the final follow-up session date for the calendar.

subject: Duplicate calendar invites for session three
description: Some participants received two invites for the same session and are confused.

subject: Request for the show notes and reading list
description: A coordinator asked for the reading list Jordan referenced during the last session.
